REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (241 Winding Way, S.F.)
Off Calendar Feb-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $390,260.00. Bond is not required. The Court granted the petition, (subject to the written order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon stated that he misread the date on the will. The Court stated that it would be construed as a penmanship issue and that the will was dated December 10, 1997. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The will was admitted.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
